name: @humancognition/hce
description: Lossless, pronounceable, encrypted codec for any identifier — reversible, format-preserving, human-readable
author: tmddn3070

scripts.build: echo 'Build via: wasm-pack build --target web ../../crates/hce-wasm && cp ../../crates/hce-wasm/pkg/hce_wasm_bg.wasm ./index_bg.wasm && cp ../../crates/hce-wasm/pkg/hce_wasm.js ./index.js && cp ../../crates/hce-wasm/pkg/hce_wasm.d.ts ./index.d.ts && cp ../../crates/hce-wasm/pkg/hce_wasm_bg.wasm.d.ts ./index_bg.wasm.d.ts'
scripts.prepublishOnly: test -f index_bg.wasm || (echo 'Run: npm run build' && exit 1)
